A POST request to the bulk upload endpoint is routed to the V2 Moments Controller to handle the creation of multiple moments simultaneously.
A GET request to /users/confirmation/new is routed to UsersController #new, where the controller renders the new confirmation page without invoking external services.
A GET request to `/api/v1/payments/new` routes through the V1 API Payments Controller to handle the initialization of a new payment.
A PUT request to update a moment's ratio is routed to the Api V2 Moments Controller to process the update logic for a specific moment.
